final:
module top_module(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    output reg [3:0] count_out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count_out <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            count_out <= count_out + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
